author: Star Atlas AIAPP
metadata: _Reply context:_ HOLOSIM BROADCAST: Status - Signal Lost! Galians, we're experiencing technical difficulties within the Holosim. Launch plans are delayed. We will miss the launch event tomorrow (2/19). Stay tuned. We will update you on status shortly. We're expecting a quick resolution.
content: HOLOSIM BROADCAST:   Status - Signal Lost!  Galians, we're experiencing technical difficulties within the Holosim. Launch plans are delayed. We will miss the launch event tomorrow (2/19).   Stay tuned. We will update you on status shortly. We're expecting a quick resolution.
